frame: Legal System Weaponisation Narrative: Women Who File DV and Dowry Cases Are Liars
generated_comment: Arre, main service mein 30 saal raha hoon, aise cases bahut dekhe hain. Seedhi baat bolo toh genuine bhi hote hain, lekin aajkal 70-80 percent mein pehle ghar ka jhagda hota hai, phir ladki wale pressure banane ke liye DV aur dowry ka case daal dete hain. Police ko bhi pata hota hai kaun sa matter asli hai aur kaun settlement ke liye file hua hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women who file domestic violence and dowry complaints as mostly dishonest and manipulative, undermining their credibility as a group. It encodes the legal-system-weaponisation narrative by asserting that most such cases are filed to pressure or extort rather than report genuine abuse.
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 52. Married. A retired police officer in Lucknow. You are at a family function and a young man at the table mentions that his cousin's wife just filed a domestic violence complaint. The table reacts. You are the senior person at the table and everyone looks to you because of your experience with the police. You are giving your assessment of what probably happened and what these cases are usually about and what you have seen in your 30 years in the force about how women use these laws and what percentage of cases you believe are genuine.
